tx_ehr_algorithm_decision_assist_tool.description: Texas licensed provider EHR clinical decision tool used for diagnosis or treatment (non patient-facing)
notes: Applies to algorithms or decision assistance tools embedded in an EHR assisting medical treatment decisions.
Non patient-facing means primary user does not include 'patient'.

obligations.content: Ensure the electronic health record includes a separate space to document biological sex as either male or female based on observed biological sex recorded by a health care practitioner at birth.
Ensure the electronic health record includes a separate space to document information on any sexual development disorder of the individual.

Ensure any algorithm or decision assistance tool included in the electronic health record to assist in medical treatment decisions includes the individual's biological sex as recorded in the EHR biological sex field.

notes: §183.007(b) allows additional fields related to biological sex or gender identity; this section does not prohibit them.
